title: M3M
description: M3M is one of India’s leading luxury real estate developers, known for delivering landmark residential and commercial properties that blend innovation, sophistication, and world-class design. With a strong presence in Gurgaon and other emerging urban hubs, M3M has redefined modern living through its commitment to excellence, architectural brilliance, and unmatched lifestyle amenities.

title: Omaxe
description: Omaxe is one of India’s most trusted and established real estate developers, known for its commitment to quality, reliability, and customer-centric development. With over three decades of experience, Omaxe has delivered a diverse portfolio of residential, commercial, and integrated township projects across multiple cities, making it a household name in India’s real estate landscape.

title: DLF
description: DLF is India’s most prestigious and influential real estate developer, renowned for setting global benchmarks in luxury living, commercial excellence, and urban infrastructure. With a legacy spanning over seven decades, DLF has shaped the skylines of major cities through iconic developments that reflect innovation, elegance, and world-class craftsmanship.

title: Spaze
description: Spaze is a rapidly growing and highly respected real estate developer known for delivering modern, design-driven commercial and residential spaces across key locations in Gurugram. With a strong commitment to quality construction, timely delivery, and value-driven development, Spaze has built a solid reputation among investors, businesses, and homebuyers seeking contemporary and efficient real estate solutions.

title: Unitech
description: Unitech is one of India’s most recognized and longstanding real estate developers, known for shaping urban landscapes through a diverse portfolio of residential, commercial, retail, and hospitality projects. With decades of experience in the industry, Unitech has played a significant role in transforming modern Indian cities with thoughtfully planned townships, high-rise residences, IT parks, and lifestyle-centric developments.

title: Vatika
description: Vatika Group is a leading real estate developer known for creating thoughtfully planned, well-designed, and sustainable communities across North India. With a strong focus on enhancing quality of life, Vatika is committed to developing spaces that blend functionality, aesthetics, and long-term value. Their portfolio spans residential townships, commercial complexes, business centres, retail hubs, and hospitality projects—each reflecting meticulous planning and modern design principles.

title: Godrej
description: Founded in 1990 and headquartered in Mumbai, Godrej Properties is the real-estate arm of the Godrej Group. Over the decades, it has grown into one of India’s leading developers — with a pan-India presence across major cities and a portfolio spanning residential complexes, townships, mixed-use developments and commercial projects. What sets Godrej Properties apart is its commitment to quality, design-led development and sustainability. GPL combines the long-standing trust and legacy of the Godrej Group with modern construction techniques, green-building practices, and customer-centric planning. As of recent data, it maintains a large development pipeline — making it a preferred name for homebuyers seeking reliability, design integrity, and a broad city-wise footprint.
